venues.name: Saint Restaurant Bar & Speakeasy
venues.vibe_summary: A true hidden gem that offers an escape from the frantic energy of the surrounding blocks. It provides a quiet, refined atmosphere perfect for focused, high-end cocktail contemplation.
venues.best_time: Weekday evenings for a quieter experience.

venues.name: Holiday Cocktail Lounge
venues.address: 75 Saint Marks Pl, New York, NY 10003
venues.vibe_summary: A legendary LES-adjacent watering hole that feels like time-traveled from a grittier era. The space perfectly balances classic cocktail sophistication with the neighborhood's authentic, no-frills roots.
venues.best_time: Early evening, before the late-night crowd arrives.

venues.name: Paul's Cocktail Lounge
venues.address: 2 Avenue of the Americas, New York, NY 10013
venues.vibe_summary: A colorful, kitschy sanctuary that feels more like an eccentric living room than a standard bar. The vibe is lively and perfect for those who want a unique, memorable scene away from traditional lounge tropes.
venues.best_time: Late night when the energy peaks.
